metadata.description: Marketplace for the odoo-ai-skills suite — read-ground-truth-first Odoo 17/18/19 development skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: odoo-ai-skills
plugins.description: Odoo 17/18/19 development skills suite: read ground truth from the running instance first (fields, MRO/super, views, security, runtime flow + state, reverse field impact, load state), build the smallest correct change, test it, review it — never guess. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web, security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy, and domain playbooks.
